ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
If enabled, numbers will use a comma (e.g. 1.103,14) instead of a dot (e.g. 1,103.14) as the decimal separator. This only applies to output formatting; for input, both formats are supported.
This setting can be overridden by the frontmatter property: acj-commaAsDecimal
ast.target:
启用后，数字将使用逗号（例如 1.103,14）而不是点号（例如 1,103.14）作为小数分隔符。此项仅影响输出格式；输入时两种格式均支持。
该设置可由frontmatter属性覆盖：acj-commaAsDecimal

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Character used to separate the credit and debit columns in the journal. This is used to format the journal entries.
This setting can be overridden by the frontmatter property: acj-journalSeparator
ast.target:
用于分隔日记账中贷方与借方列的字符。用于格式化日记账分录。
该设置可由frontmatter属性覆盖：acj-journalSeparator

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Path to the CSV file in your vault used to resolve account name equivalents.
This setting can be overridden by the frontmatter property: acj-accountEquivalence
ast.target:
用于解析账户名称对等项的库中CSV文件路径。
该设置可由frontmatter属性覆盖：acj-accountEquivalence

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No active file to fix accounting entries.
ast.target: 没有可用于修正会计分录的活动文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error getting account equivalence from frontmatter. Using default settings.
ast.target: 从 frontmatter 获取账户等价项时出错。使用默认设置。
